task: 请根据工作区 reports/ 目录下的英文销售摘要文件，找到 2024 年上半年（January–June）销售额增长最快的区域（region），将区域名称和增长率（百分比，保留一位小数）写入 model_output/fastest_growing_region_h1_2024.txt，格式为：Region: <name>, Growth: <rate>%
rubrics: output file model_output/fastest_growing_region_h1_2024.txt exists and is non-empty
output file contains exactly one region entry
output file contains the correct region name (North America from region_summary_073.txt with growth=34.6%)
output file format matches 'Region: <name>, Growth: <rate>%' exactly
growth rate value is 34.6% (highest H1-2024 growth in the corpus)
agent uses search or systematic file access to locate the correct region among 200+ report files
notes: E11 discovery-stressed + cross-lingual case 2. Task in Chinese, files in English. Target file region_summary_073.txt buried among 200 region summary files. Tests semfs cross-lingual rewrite: 增长最快的区域/2024上半年 → highest growth region / H1 2024.
